Tiga Credit Card – Apply Online for 3× Rewards & Interest Free Benefits
The Equitas Tiga Credit Card is a rewards‐oriented digital credit card product that offers features like up to 50 days interest-free credit, 3× reward points on UPI/Contactless/Pay-by-3 merchant spends, and various insurance & waiver benefits.
Key Features
Pay by 3
Earn 3x Reward Points on UPI, Contactless payments & pay-by-3 merchants*.
Pay by 3
Automatically convert transactions with select merchants* into a 3-month Low-cost EMI.
Introductory Low Annual Percentage Rate
Low interest rate of just 0.99% p.m. for the first 3 months*
Reward Points on Every Spend
Earn 1 Reward Point for every Rs 100 spent on everyday transactions
Benefits
Additional Features & Benefits
Additional Features & Benefits
Limited Period Offer: Get Your First Year Free Tiga Card today Excluding GST.
Spend Rs. 1,20,000 in the previous anniversary year to get your renewal fee waived.
Pay by 3 Merchants List - Tata Cliq, Skull Candy, Tony & Guy, Tony & Guy Essentuals, 1% Club, Lectrix, Prashanthi Sareex`s, Netmeds, SLAM Fitness, Wedtree
Enjoy peace of mind with lost card liability. Refer terms and Conditions
Fuel Surcharge Waiver: Save more with a 1% waiver on fuel transactions across India (up to Rs. 100 per statement cycle on transactions between Rs. 500 and Rs. 3,000).
Interest-Free Credit: Enjoy up to 50 days of interest-free credit on your spending.
Enjoy 3X rewards on transactions via UPI, Contactless & Pay by 3 merchants. Earn 1RP on every Rs.100 spent. 1 RP= 0.15
Xchange Program: Redeem your reward points against Products/ Vouchers/ Flight Booking and more. https://xchange.equitas.bank.in/ .
Equitas Bank Credit Card Customers are requested to check with their preferred brand’s policy on accepting single/multiple vouchers against a single invoice and accordingly decide to redeem their reward points from Xchange Rewards Portal. Bank will not be responsible for any rejects from the brand on not allowing to use multiple vouchers under a single purchase/invoice, as that will purely be the brand’s decision only.
Mandate HQ: Automate and simplify your recurring payments to never miss a due date.

FAQs
Pay by 3 – Tiga -
What is the Pay by 3 program?
It is a feature for Tiga Card where eligible transactions at select merchants are automatically converted into a 3-month EMI, making payments easier without manual conversion.
Which transactions are eligible for Pay by 3?
Only transactions done at partner merchants are eligible. Non-partner and UPI transactions are excluded.
What interest is charged under Pay by 3?
It comes with no additional cost from the customer
When are transactions converted into EMI?
Transactions are converted into EMI only on the statement generation date.
How is EMI billed in the statement?
Only the EMI instalment is billed, while other transactions are billed in full.
Will my credit limit be blocked?
Yes, full transaction amount is blocked and released gradually as EMIs are repaid.
Can I pre-close the EMI?
Yes, pre-closure is allowed with applicable charges and reversal of benefits.
What happens if a transaction is reversed?
Reversal is adjusted in next statement and affects EMI conversion based on net amount.
Will I earn reward points?
Yes, 3X accelerated reward points are credited in the next billing cycle.
What is the reward point value?
₹0.15 for travel/vouchers and ₹0.10 for cashback redemption.
Are there redemption conditions?
Minimum 500 points required for cashback, validity 24 months, ₹99 redemption fee applicable.
Billing Cycle +
Can I change my billing cycle for my credit card?
Yes, you have the option to change your billing cycle for your credit card, allowing you to better align your billing and payment due dates with your financial planning needs.
How many times can I change my billing cycle?
You can request a billing cycle change only once per credit card, so it is important to carefully choose the most suitable option before confirming your request.
How can I request a billing cycle change?
You can request a billing cycle change through the Mobile Banking (MB) App or by contacting the Customer Care Centre (CCC), making the process simple and convenient.
What billing cycle dates are available for selection?
You can choose from the available billing cycle dates which include the 5th, 12th, 13th, 14th, 15th, 16th, 18th, 20th, and 25th of the month.
Can I select a billing cycle date outside the available options?
No, you can only select from the predefined billing cycle dates provided by the bank, and requests for any other dates will not be accepted.
When will the new billing cycle be applied?
The revised billing cycle will typically be implemented in the next billing period after your request is processed, depending on system timelines.
Can I change my billing cycle again later?
No, as per policy, only one billing cycle change is allowed per credit card, and further changes will not be permitted once it has been updated.
Will my payment due date change if I update my billing cycle?
Yes, your payment due date will change accordingly since it is directly linked to your selected billing cycle.
Is there any fee for changing the billing cycle?
Currently, there is no specific fee mentioned for changing the billing cycle, but customers are advised to check the latest terms and conditions or confirm during the request.
What factors should I consider before changing my billing cycle?
You should consider your salary credit date, repayment capacity, and existing financial commitments before selecting a new billing cycle, to ensure it aligns with your repayment convenience.
MCC Codes +
How are reward points calculated for my transactions?
Reward points, including accelerated rewards, are calculated based on the Merchant Category Code (MCC) assigned to the merchant where the transaction is made, which determines the applicable reward category.
What is a Merchant Category Code (MCC)?
An MCC is a four-digit code assigned to merchants based on their primary business activity, which helps the bank classify transactions and determine rewards eligibility.
Why is MCC important for earning rewards?
The MCC helps determine whether your transaction qualifies for accelerated rewards, as reward categories are mapped to specific MCC codes defined by the bank.
Which MCCs are included in the Dining category?
Transactions will be classified under Dining if the merchant falls under MCCs 5462, 5812, or 5814, as defined by the bank for reward eligibility.
Which MCCs are included in the Apparel category?
Transactions will be considered under Apparel if they fall under MCCs 5311, 5611, 5621, 5641, 5651, 5691, 5655, 5631, or 5699.
Which MCCs are included in the Grocery category?
Transactions will be categorized as Grocery if they fall under MCCs 5399, 5411, 5441, 5499, 5311, 5331, 5422, or 5451 as per the defined criteria.
Which MCCs are included in the Utility category?
Transactions will be considered under Utility if the merchant falls under MCCs 4814 or 4900.
Which MCC is applicable for Taxi category?
Taxi-related transactions will be classified under MCC 4121 for rewards eligibility.
Will all transactions in a category always earn accelerated rewards?
Not necessarily, as rewards are based on the MCC assigned to the merchant and not solely on the type of product or service purchased.
What if a transaction is classified under a different MCC?
If a transaction is tagged under a different MCC by the merchant’s acquiring bank, it may not qualify for accelerated rewards even if it appears to belong to a selected category.
Can the bank change the MCC of a transaction?
No, the MCC is assigned by the merchant’s acquiring bank or payment network and cannot be modified by the card-issuing bank.
What happens if a transaction does not match selected categories?
If a transaction does not fall under the selected categories based on MCC mapping, it will still earn base reward points but not accelerated rewards.
Spend Waiver +
Is there a joining fee for the credit card?
Yes, a joining fee will be charged to the cardholder at the time of card issuance; however, this fee is eligible for reversal if the required spend condition is fulfilled within the specified timeline.
How can I get my joining fee reversed for Powermiles Card?
The joining fee will be reversed if you spend ₹1,20,000 within 90 days from the date of card activation, as per the defined eligibility criteria.
How will the joining fee be reversed?
The joining fee will be reversed in the form of cashback in the subsequent billing cycle after meeting the spend criteria, excluding applicable GST charges.
Will GST on the joining fee also be reversed?
No, GST applicable on the joining fee will not be reversed and will have to be borne by the cardholder as per government regulations.
What is the annual fee waiver condition for Powermiles Card?
The annual fee will be waived if you achieve a total spend of ₹4,80,000 in the preceding anniversary year of your credit card.
When will the annual fee waiver be applied?
The annual fee waiver will be evaluated based on your spending in the previous card anniversary year and will be applied accordingly in the subsequent cycle.
Will GST be reversed in case of annual fee waiver?
No, even if the annual fee is waived or reversed, the GST component will not be reversed and will continue to be payable by the cardholder.
What happens if I do not meet the spend criteria for fee reversal?
If the required spend criteria is not met within the given timeframe, the joining or annual fee will not be reversed and will be charged as applicable.
What is the annual fee waiver condition for Selfe credit card?
The annual fee for the credit card will be waived if the customer achieves a total spend of ₹2,40,000 in the preceding anniversary year of the card.
What does 'preceding anniversary year' mean?
The preceding anniversary year refers to the 12-month period immediately before your card renewal date, during which your total spends are evaluated for waiver eligibility.
What happens if I do not reach ₹2,40,000 spend?
If your total eligible spends do not reach ₹2,40,000 in the preceding year, the annual fee will be charged as applicable and will not be waived.
Do all transactions count towards the annual fee waiver spend?
Only eligible transactions as defined by the bank will be considered for calculating the total spend required for the annual fee waiver.
Insurance +
What insurance benefit is available on my credit card?
Your credit card offers a Lost Card Liability cover of up to ₹10 lakhs(varies basis credit card ), protecting you against unauthorized transactions in case your card is lost or stolen, subject to policy terms.
Who is eligible for this insurance coverage?
This insurance benefit is applicable only to the primary cardholder and is not available for add-on or supplementary cardholders.
What is covered under the Lost Card Liability policy?
The policy covers unauthorized transactions made using your lost or stolen card, up to the specified coverage limit, as per the policy terms and conditions.
When does the insurance coverage become active?
The insurance coverage becomes active only after you complete either your first card transaction, PIN setup, or card activation.
Will I be covered if I have not activated or used my card?
No, the insurance benefit will not be active until the card is activated, PIN is set, or the first transaction is completed.
Is there a maximum coverage limit under this policy?
Yes, the Lost Card Liability coverage is available up to a maximum of ₹10,00,000 as per the policy terms.
Where can I check the detailed policy terms and conditions?
You can refer to the policy document provided by the bank at https://equitas.bank.in/complimentary-insurance-policy/ to understand detailed coverage, exclusions, and claim process.
What should I do if my card is lost or stolen?
In case your card is lost or stolen, you should immediately block your card through the mobile banking app or contact customer care and follow the claim process as per the policy.
Reward Redemption +
How can I redeem my reward points?
You can redeem your reward points for travel bookings, gift vouchers, catalogue purchases, cashback against your card statement, or instant redemption at partner merchants.
What is the value of each reward point for a Selfe Card?
The value of each reward point varies by redemption type, with travel, vouchers, and catalogue redemptions valuing ₹0.35 per point, while cashback and instant redemption value ₹0.15 per point.
Is the reward point value the same for all redemption options?
No, the reward point value differs depending on the redemption option selected, with higher value typically available for travel and vouchers.
Is there a minimum number of points required for redemption?
Yes, a minimum of 500 reward points is required for redeeming points as cashback against your card statement.
Do reward points expire for Tiga and Selfe Card?
Yes, reward points expire after 24 months from the date they are earned if they are not redeemed within this period.
Do reward points expire for Powermiles Card?
Yes, reward points expire after 36 months from the date they are earned if they are not redeemed within this period.
Is there any fee for redeeming reward points?
Yes, a redemption fee of ₹99 per transaction will be charged whenever reward points are redeemed.
Can redeemed reward points be reversed?
No, once reward points are redeemed, they cannot be reversed, cancelled, or reissued.
Can I use reward points instantly while making a purchase?
Yes, you can use reward points for instant redemption at select partner merchants during transactions.
What happens if my reward points expire?
If reward points expire after 24 months for Tiga & Selfe and 36 months for Powermiles, they will be forfeited and cannot be reinstated or used later.
How do I earn reward points on my Powermiles credit card?
You will earn 3 reward points for every ₹100 spent on eligible retail transactions, helping you accumulate points on your everyday spending.
Do I earn additional rewards on international transactions on my Powermiles card?
Yes, you will earn 3X accelerated reward points on eligible international transactions, allowing you to earn rewards faster compared to domestic spends.
Are all transactions eligible for earning reward points?
No, transactions such as fuel, rent, wallet loads, government payments, cash advances, and EMI conversions are excluded from earning reward points unless specified otherwise.
What is the value of each reward point for a Powermiles Card?
The value of each reward point depends on redemption type: ₹0.50 per point for travel, vouchers, and catalogue, and ₹0.25 per point for cashback or instant redemption.
Do reward points expire for Powermiles card?
Yes, reward points are valid for up to 36 months from the date of earning, as communicated by the bank.
Lounge Access +
Can unused lounge visits be carried forward?
No, unused lounge visits cannot be carried forward to the next quarter and will lapse.
What are the conditions to access airport lounges?
You must present a valid credit card at the lounge terminal and complete a successful authorization transaction.
Is lounge access guaranteed?
Lounge access is subject to successful authorization and lounge partner conditions, including availability.
Is complimentary guest access available?
No, complimentary guest access is not provided and guests will be charged as per applicable rates.
What happens if I exceed my free lounge visits?
If you exceed your complimentary visits, charges will be applicable as per the lounge provider's terms and conditions.
How do I know if my lounge visit is counted?
A nominal authorization transaction at the lounge confirms that your complimentary visit has been used.
Application forms complete in all respects will be processed within 30 days from the date of receipt of application form.
Wherever additional information / documentation is required to process the application form, the same shall be intimated to the customer within 30 days from the date of receipt of the application form.

Selfe Credit Card – Apply Online for Interest Free & 5X Reward Benefits
The Equitas Selfe Credit Card is a digital-first card that can be applied for online without paperwork. It offers interest-free periods, attractive 5X rewards on spends, and easy online management, making it an ideal choice for customers seeking a seamless and rewarding credit card experience.
Key Features
Choice of Accelerated Rewards
Earn 5X rewards on 2 out of 5 categories that matter to you: Apparel, Dining, Grocery, Utility and Taxi
Choice of Membership
Choose 2 complimentary memberships from top platforms like Amazon Prime, Jio Hotstar, Sony Liv, Zee5, or Discovery+
Choice of Card Style
Personalize your card style by choosing from regular, eco-friendly or sleek metal
Choice of Payment Network
Choose between Visa & RuPay for seamless payments
Choice of Preferred Billing Date
Choose a billing date that works best for you- 12th, 16th & 20th of every month
Domestic Lounge
Enjoy one complimentary domestic lounge access per calendar quarter
Earn Reward Points
Earn 2 Reward Points for every Rs 100 spent, rewarding you on everyday transactions
Your Choice Matters!
Card Variants
Card Variants
Choose your Selfe
Equitas Selfe Credit Cards are available in 3 unique design options that reflects your personality.
Regular Card
Our classic blue plastic credit card boasts a sleek, minimalist design and comes with no additional fees, making it a practical choice for your financial needs.
Green Card
Support for a better tomorrow by choosing our Recycled Plastic Credit Cards. Eco-friendly Credit cards reduces the use of plastic by offering a more sustainable replacement of the plastic cards.
Metal Card
Elevate your choices by adding Metal Credit Card in your wallet. Enjoy all the features of Equitas Selfe Credit Card with the power of Metal in your hand.
Benefits

Additional Features & Benefits
Limited Period Offer: Get Your First Year Free Selfe Card today Excluding GST.
Spend Rs. 2,40,000 in the previous anniversary year to get your renewal fee waived. Enjoy peace of mind with lost card liability. Refer Terms & Conditions

Interest-Free Credit: Enjoy up to 50 days of interest-free credit on your spending.
Earn 5X rewards on spends in the categories chosen by you. Earn 2RP on every Rs.100 spent. 1 RP= 0.35
Xchange Program: Redeem your reward points against Products/ Vouchers/ Flight Booking and more. https://xchange.equitas.bank.in/ . A video guide for claiming Selfe Credit Card Memberships Xchange Rewards
The Memberships offered for Selfe Credit Card customer will be available once the card is activated by the customer. These memberships should be claimed within 90 days from the card issuance date. Please note that the membership details will be made available for claim on T+1 date from the card activation date. Customers can visit xchange.equitas.bank.in to claim their membership vouchers. If Membership benefits (complimentary offer) is not claimed before the said timeline, then such benefits will get expired and cannot be renewed. Please refer T&C for more information.
Equitas Bank Credit Card Customers are requested to check with their preferred brand’s policy on accepting single/multiple vouchers against a single invoice and accordingly decide to redeem their reward points from Xchange Rewards Portal. Bank will not be responsible for any rejects from the brand on not allowing to use multiple vouchers under a single purchase/invoice, as that will purely be the brand’s decision only.

FAQs
Membership Redemption -
How do rewards work in Selfe Card?
You can earn 5X reward points on the categories selected by you, while all other eligible transactions will earn base reward points.
When will Selfe Card memberships be available?
Your selected memberships will be available for claim after your card is activated and will reflect on the portal within T+3 working days.
How do I claim my membership?
You can claim your membership by logging into the Xchange portal, selecting your eligible membership, and completing the claim process in a few simple steps.
Is there a deadline to claim memberships?
Yes, all memberships must be claimed within 90 days from the card issuance date, failing which they will expire.
What happens if I fail to claim in time?
If the membership is not claimed within the specified timeline, it will expire automatically and cannot be renewed or reinstated later.
Can I transfer or exchange my membership?
No, all memberships are non-transferable and cannot be exchanged for cash or any other benefit, and can only be used by the eligible cardholder.
What is the Selfe Credit Card?
The Selfe Credit Card is a customizable credit card that allows you to personalize your card experience by selecting your preferred benefits, accelerated reward categories, memberships, and even the card design.
What customization options are available with Selfe Card?
With the Selfe Credit Card, you can customize billing cycle, card design and material type, OTT memberships, reward categories, and card network, giving you flexibility and control.
Benefits +
What happens if I do not select any preferences while applying for the Selfe Credit Card?
If you do not choose any preferences during the application process, the system will automatically assign default options as per the bank’s predefined configuration to ensure your card is issued without delay.
What are the default options assigned to my Selfe Credit Card?
In case no selections are made, the default options will be assigned as follows: Billing Cycle – 12th, Card Design – Regular, Memberships – Amazon Prime and Jio Hotstar, 5X Reward Categories – Apparel and Dining, and Card Network – RuPay
Will I still receive full benefits if defaults are assigned?
Yes, even with default selections, customers will continue to enjoy all applicable benefits, rewards, and memberships linked to their Selfe Credit Card.
Billing Cycle +
Can I change my billing cycle for my credit card?
Yes, you have the option to change your billing cycle for your credit card, allowing you to better align your billing and payment due dates with your financial planning needs.
How many times can I change my billing cycle?
You can request a billing cycle change only once per credit card, so it is important to carefully choose the most suitable option before confirming your request.
How can I request a billing cycle change?
You can request a billing cycle change through the Mobile Banking (MB) App or by contacting the Customer Care Centre (CCC), making the process simple and convenient.
What billing cycle dates are available for selection?
You can choose from the available billing cycle dates which include the 5th, 12th, 13th, 14th, 15th, 16th, 18th, 20th, and 25th of the month.
Can I select a billing cycle date outside the available options?
No, you can only select from the predefined billing cycle dates provided by the bank, and requests for any other dates will not be accepted.
When will the new billing cycle be applied?
The revised billing cycle will typically be implemented in the next billing period after your request is processed, depending on system timelines.
Can I change my billing cycle again later?
No, as per policy, only one billing cycle change is allowed per credit card, and further changes will not be permitted once it has been updated.
Will my payment due date change if I update my billing cycle?
Yes, your payment due date will change accordingly since it is directly linked to your selected billing cycle.
Is there any fee for changing the billing cycle?
Currently, there is no specific fee mentioned for changing the billing cycle, but customers are advised to check the latest terms and conditions or confirm during the request.
What factors should I consider before changing my billing cycle?
You should consider your salary credit date, repayment capacity, and existing financial commitments before selecting a new billing cycle, to ensure it aligns with your repayment convenience.

When will the annual fee waiver be applied?
The annual fee waiver will be evaluated based on your spending in the previous card anniversary year and will be applied accordingly in the subsequent cycle.
Will GST be reversed in case of annual fee waiver?
No, even if the annual fee is waived or reversed, the GST component will not be reversed and will continue to be payable by the cardholder.
What happens if I do not meet the spend criteria for fee reversal?
If the required spend criteria is not met within the given timeframe, the joining or annual fee will not be reversed and will be charged as applicable.
What is the annual fee waiver condition for Selfe credit card?
The annual fee for the credit card will be waived if the customer achieves a total spend of ₹2,40,000 in the preceding anniversary year of the card.
What does 'preceding anniversary year' mean?
The preceding anniversary year refers to the 12-month period immediately before your card renewal date, during which your total spends are evaluated for waiver eligibility.
What happens if I do not reach ₹2,40,000 spend?
If your total eligible spends do not reach ₹2,40,000 in the preceding year, the annual fee will be charged as applicable and will not be waived.
Do all transactions count towards the annual fee waiver spend?
Only eligible transactions as defined by the bank will be considered for calculating the total spend required for the annual fee waiver.
Insurance +
What insurance benefit is available on my credit card?
Your credit card offers a Lost Card Liability cover of up to ₹10 lakhs(varies basis credit card ), protecting you against unauthorized transactions in case your card is lost or stolen, subject to policy terms.
Who is eligible for this insurance coverage?
This insurance benefit is applicable only to the primary cardholder and is not available for add-on or supplementary cardholders.
What is covered under the Lost Card Liability policy?
The policy covers unauthorized transactions made using your lost or stolen card, up to the specified coverage limit, as per the policy terms and conditions.
When does the insurance coverage become active?
The insurance coverage becomes active only after you complete either your first card transaction, PIN setup, or card activation.
Will I be covered if I have not activated or used my card?
No, the insurance benefit will not be active until the card is activated, PIN is set, or the first transaction is completed.
Is there a maximum coverage limit under this policy?
Yes, the Lost Card Liability coverage is available up to a maximum of ₹10,00,000 as per the policy terms.
Where can I check the detailed policy terms and conditions?
You can refer to the policy document provided by the bank at https://equitas.bank.in/complimentary-insurance-policy/ to understand detailed coverage, exclusions, and claim process.
What should I do if my card is lost or stolen?
In case your card is lost or stolen, you should immediately block your card through the mobile banking app or contact customer care and follow the claim process as per the policy.
Reward Redemption +
How can I redeem my reward points?
You can redeem your reward points for travel bookings, gift vouchers, catalogue purchases, cashback against your card statement, or instant redemption at partner merchants.
What is the value of each reward point for a Selfe Card?
The value of each reward point varies by redemption type, with travel, vouchers, and catalogue redemptions valuing ₹0.35 per point, while cashback and instant redemption value ₹0.15 per point.
Is the reward point value the same for all redemption options?
No, the reward point value differs depending on the redemption option selected, with higher value typically available for travel and vouchers.
Is there a minimum number of points required for redemption?
Yes, a minimum of 500 reward points is required for redeeming points as cashback against your card statement.
Do reward points expire for Tiga and Selfe Card?
Yes, reward points expire after 24 months from the date they are earned if they are not redeemed within this period.
Do reward points expire for Powermiles Card?
Yes, reward points expire after 36 months from the date they are earned if they are not redeemed within this period.
Is there any fee for redeeming reward points?
Yes, a redemption fee of ₹99 per transaction will be charged whenever reward points are redeemed.
Can redeemed reward points be reversed?
No, once reward points are redeemed, they cannot be reversed, cancelled, or reissued.
Can I use reward points instantly while making a purchase?
Yes, you can use reward points for instant redemption at select partner merchants during transactions.
What happens if my reward points expire?
If reward points expire after 24 months for Tiga & Selfe and 36 months for Powermiles, they will be forfeited and cannot be reinstated or used later.
How do I earn reward points on my Powermiles credit card?
You will earn 3 reward points for every ₹100 spent on eligible retail transactions, helping you accumulate points on your everyday spending.
Do I earn additional rewards on international transactions on my Powermiles card?
Yes, you will earn 3X accelerated reward points on eligible international transactions, allowing you to earn rewards faster compared to domestic spends.
Are all transactions eligible for earning reward points?
No, transactions such as fuel, rent, wallet loads, government payments, cash advances, and EMI conversions are excluded from earning reward points unless specified otherwise.
What is the value of each reward point for a Powermiles Card?
The value of each reward point depends on redemption type: ₹0.50 per point for travel, vouchers, and catalogue, and ₹0.25 per point for cashback or instant redemption.
Do reward points expire for Powermiles card?
Yes, reward points are valid for up to 36 months from the date of earning, as communicated by the bank.
Lounge Access +
Can unused lounge visits be carried forward?
No, unused lounge visits cannot be carried forward to the next quarter and will lapse.
What are the conditions to access airport lounges?
You must present a valid credit card at the lounge terminal and complete a successful authorization transaction.
Is lounge access guaranteed?
Lounge access is subject to successful authorization and lounge partner conditions, including availability.
Is complimentary guest access available?
No, complimentary guest access is not provided and guests will be charged as per applicable rates.
What happens if I exceed my free lounge visits?
If you exceed your complimentary visits, charges will be applicable as per the lounge provider's terms and conditions.
How do I know if my lounge visit is counted?
A nominal authorization transaction at the lounge confirms that your complimentary visit has been used.
What lounge access benefit do I get on my Selfe credit card?
You are eligible for 1 complimentary domestic airport lounge visit per calendar quarter, which allows you to access lounge facilities during your travel.
How many lounge visits can I use in a year on my Selfe card?
You can avail up to 4 complimentary domestic lounge visits in a year, as one visit is provided per quarter
Forex +
What forex mark-up fee is applicable on international transactions for Selfe card?
A 3.5% foreign currency mark-up fee is applicable on all overseas transactions made using the credit card.
Are there any additional charges on international transactions?
Yes, in addition to the forex mark-up fee, applicable GST and currency conversion charges based on network rates may apply.
How is the final billed amount calculated for international transactions?
The final billed amount is calculated based on the exchange rate provided by the card network, along with the applicable forex mark-up fee and taxes.
Does the bank control the exchange rate applied?
No, the exchange rate is determined by the card network such as Visa or RuPay, and the bank does not control it.
Is the bank responsible for exchange rate fluctuations?
No, the bank is not responsible for exchange rate fluctuations, as these are based on market conditions and network rates.
Are there any third-party charges involved?
Yes, third-party currency conversion or mark-up charges may be applicable as per the merchant or card network, and are not controlled by the bank.
Can the final billed amount differ from the transaction amount?
Yes, the final billed amount may differ due to exchange rate variations, conversion charges, and applicable taxes at the time of processing.

PowerMiles Credit Card – Apply Online & Earn Travel Rewards

It offers interest-free credit periods, reward-points to miles conversion, and travel benefits like international lounge access, travel insurance, etc.

FAQs
Membership Redemption -
What memberships do I get with the PowerMiles Credit Card?
As a PowerMiles Credit Card holder, you are eligible to receive Club Marriott and EazyDiner memberships, which offer dining and lifestyle benefits through partner brands.
Are these memberships free?
Yes, both memberships are provided completely free of cost on an annual basis, subject to meeting the eligibility criteria and adhering to the applicable terms and conditions.
When will I become eligible for these memberships?
You will become eligible for the memberships once you activate your credit card within the specified timeline, as activation is required to unlock these benefits.
When will my membership be available to claim?
Your membership details will be made available for claim within 3 working days (T+3) after your card is successfully activated.
Where do I claim my membership?
You can conveniently claim your membership by visiting the Xchange portal at xchange.equitas.bank.in and logging in with your registered credentials.
What is the last date to claim the membership?
You must ensure that you claim your membership within 90 days from the date of your card issuance, as this is the defined validity period.
Benefits +
Why have these default options been assigned to my card?
These default options are assigned as per bank policy when no customer preferences are selected during the application journey, to ensure seamless card issuance and benefit allocation.
Was this information shared during the application process?
Yes, the details regarding default selections are clearly mentioned in the application form, and customers are expected to review and select their preferences before submission.
Can I change the default options after the card is issued?
Once the card has been issued with default options, changes may not be allowed as selections are captured during the application. Customers may contact support for further guidance as per policy.
Can I raise a complaint if I did not select preferences?
As per policy, default options are automatically assigned when no selections are made and this is informed during the application process, hence such cases are generally not treated as service issues.
What should I do to avoid default selections in the future?
To avoid default assignment, customers should carefully review all available options and make their preferred selections during the application process before submitting the form.
Billing Cycle +
Can I change my billing cycle for my credit card?
Yes, you have the option to change your billing cycle for your credit card, allowing you to better align your billing and payment due dates with your financial planning needs.
How many times can I change my billing cycle?
You can request a billing cycle change only once per credit card, so it is important to carefully choose the most suitable option before confirming your request.
How can I request a billing cycle change?
You can request a billing cycle change through the Mobile Banking (MB) App or by contacting the Customer Care Centre (CCC), making the process simple and convenient.
What billing cycle dates are available for selection?
You can choose from the available billing cycle dates which include the 5th, 12th, 13th, 14th, 15th, 16th, 18th, 20th, and 25th of the month.
Can I select a billing cycle date outside the available options?
No, you can only select from the predefined billing cycle dates provided by the bank, and requests for any other dates will not be accepted.
When will the new billing cycle be applied?
The revised billing cycle will typically be implemented in the next billing period after your request is processed, depending on system timelines.
Can I change my billing cycle again later?
No, as per policy, only one billing cycle change is allowed per credit card, and further changes will not be permitted once it has been updated.
Will my payment due date change if I update my billing cycle?
Yes, your payment due date will change accordingly since it is directly linked to your selected billing cycle.
Is there any fee for changing the billing cycle?
Currently, there is no specific fee mentioned for changing the billing cycle, but customers are advised to check the latest terms and conditions or confirm during the request.
What factors should I consider before changing my billing cycle?
You should consider your salary credit date, repayment capacity, and existing financial commitments before selecting a new billing cycle, to ensure it aligns with your repayment convenience.
MCC Codes +
How are reward points calculated for my transactions?
Reward points, including accelerated rewards, are calculated based on the Merchant Category Code (MCC) assigned to the merchant where the transaction is made, which determines the applicable reward category.
What is a Merchant Category Code (MCC)?
An MCC is a four-digit code assigned to merchants based on their primary business activity, which helps the bank classify transactions and determine rewards eligibility.
Why is MCC important for earning rewards?
The MCC helps determine whether your transaction qualifies for accelerated rewards, as reward categories are mapped to specific MCC codes defined by the bank.
Which MCCs are included in the Dining category?
Transactions will be classified under Dining if the merchant falls under MCCs 5462, 5812, or 5814, as defined by the bank for reward eligibility.
Which MCCs are included in the Apparel category?
Transactions will be considered under Apparel if they fall under MCCs 5311, 5611, 5621, 5641, 5651, 5691, 5655, 5631, or 5699.
Which MCCs are included in the Grocery category?
Transactions will be categorized as Grocery if they fall under MCCs 5399, 5411, 5441, 5499, 5311, 5331, 5422, or 5451 as per the defined criteria.
Which MCCs are included in the Utility category?
Transactions will be considered under Utility if the merchant falls under MCCs 4814 or 4900.
Which MCC is applicable for Taxi category?
Taxi-related transactions will be classified under MCC 4121 for rewards eligibility.
Will all transactions in a category always earn accelerated rewards?
Not necessarily, as rewards are based on the MCC assigned to the merchant and not solely on the type of product or service purchased.
What if a transaction is classified under a different MCC?
If a transaction is tagged under a different MCC by the merchant’s acquiring bank, it may not qualify for accelerated rewards even if it appears to belong to a selected category.
Can the bank change the MCC of a transaction?
No, the MCC is assigned by the merchant’s acquiring bank or payment network and cannot be modified by the card-issuing bank.
What happens if a transaction does not match selected categories?
If a transaction does not fall under the selected categories based on MCC mapping, it will still earn base reward points but not accelerated rewards.
Spend Waiver +
Is there a joining fee for the credit card?
Yes, a joining fee will be charged to the cardholder at the time of card issuance; however, this fee is eligible for reversal if the required spend condition is fulfilled within the specified timeline.
How can I get my joining fee reversed for Powermiles Card?
The joining fee will be reversed if you spend ₹1,20,000 within 90 days from the date of card activation, as per the defined eligibility criteria.
How will the joining fee be reversed?
The joining fee will be reversed in the form of cashback in the subsequent billing cycle after meeting the spend criteria, excluding applicable GST charges.
Will GST on the joining fee also be reversed?
No, GST applicable on the joining fee will not be reversed and will have to be borne by the cardholder as per government regulations.
What is the annual fee waiver condition for Powermiles Card?
The annual fee will be waived if you achieve a total spend of ₹4,80,000 in the preceding anniversary year of your credit card.
When will the annual fee waiver be applied?
The annual fee waiver will be evaluated based on your spending in the previous card anniversary year and will be applied accordingly in the subsequent cycle.
Will GST be reversed in case of annual fee waiver?
No, even if the annual fee is waived or reversed, the GST component will not be reversed and will continue to be payable by the cardholder.
What happens if I do not meet the spend criteria for fee reversal?
If the required spend criteria is not met within the given timeframe, the joining or annual fee will not be reversed and will be charged as applicable.
What is the annual fee waiver condition for Selfe credit card?
The annual fee for the credit card will be waived if the customer achieves a total spend of ₹2,40,000 in the preceding anniversary year of the card.
What does 'preceding anniversary year' mean?
The preceding anniversary year refers to the 12-month period immediately before your card renewal date, during which your total spends are evaluated for waiver eligibility.
What happens if I do not reach ₹2,40,000 spend?
If your total eligible spends do not reach ₹2,40,000 in the preceding year, the annual fee will be charged as applicable and will not be waived.
Do all transactions count towards the annual fee waiver spend?
Only eligible transactions as defined by the bank will be considered for calculating the total spend required for the annual fee waiver.

No, the insurance benefit will not be active until the card is activated, PIN is set, or the first transaction is completed.
Is there a maximum coverage limit under this policy?
Yes, the Lost Card Liability coverage is available up to a maximum of ₹10,00,000 as per the policy terms.
Where can I check the detailed policy terms and conditions?
You can refer to the policy document provided by the bank at https://equitas.bank.in/complimentary-insurance-policy/ to understand detailed coverage, exclusions, and claim process.
What should I do if my card is lost or stolen?
In case your card is lost or stolen, you should immediately block your card through the mobile banking app or contact customer care and follow the claim process as per the policy.
